hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines KYT workflows with provider-neutral aggregation, regulatory rules monitoring, and audit-ready evidence to support DFSA compliance operations for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: KYT risk visibility weakens across jurisdictions
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain consistent KYT monitoring when provider outputs and regulatory rules differ by jurisdiction. This creates delays, manual reconciliation, and gaps in audit-ready evidence for DFSA-specific digital asset compliance.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider data, jurisdictional rules, alert triage, case management and audit evidence into one operational workflow tailored for DFSA-specific KYT compliance and multi-jurisdiction risk visibility.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates KYT signals with DFSA-specific rules to route wallet risk through structured reviews, case management, evidence collection and compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another KYT tool. The compliance control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYT alerts and provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence tailored for DFSA compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing KYT workflows with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration and controlled deployment for regulatory and bank due diligence requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for DFSA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps DFSA compliance teams connect KYT monitoring, provider outputs, cases, decision logs and regulatory rule updates into one operational workflow tailored for local jurisdiction requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support DFSA KYT workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures DFSA KYT workflows by aggregating wallet and transaction risk signals, applying jurisdiction-specific rules, routing alerts, creating cases, and supporting reviewer actions and outcomes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYT audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all KYT-related decision logs, provider outputs and supporting evidence to create a reviewable audit trail suitable for DFSA supervisory and inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect with existing KYC, KYT, screening and Travel Rule providers, preserving their outputs within a controlled, governed compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT, Travel Rule or other providers but integrates their data into structured workflows, cases and evidence for compliance operations.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts to DFSA compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider-neutral KYT outputs, regulatory rules and evidence into controlled case workflows for DFSA-regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
